thresholds.criterion: Face appears to be AI-generated or manipulated (deepfake).
Liveness check failed — the face might be a photo, video, or mask.

thresholds.description: Document type must not be deprecated
thresholds.criterion: The document is outdated or no longer accepted.

thresholds.description: MRZ position array must be non‑empty
thresholds.criterion: Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) is missing or unreadable.
Text comparison on the document failed (e.g., name mismatch).
The document was not properly detected in the image.
The document is tilted or not captured from a straight angle.
The document is captured at an unusual or skewed angle.

thresholds.description: Absolute difference between agePrediction and DOB-derived age must be ≤ maxGapYears
thresholds.criterion: The predicted age does not match the age on the document.

thresholds.description: For types 0 or 1 in imageQualityList, result must equal expectedResult
thresholds.criterion: One or more required image types are of insufficient quality.
The face in the selfie does not match the document photo.
The face match is uncertain — not clearly matched or unmatched.

thresholds.description: detailsRFID.aa must success if RFID chip is present
thresholds.criterion: The RFID chip in the document did not pass verification.

thresholds.description: Citizenship in document must match profile citizenship
Check if applicant is using an electronic device during liveness verification
thresholds.criterion: Applicant may be using an electronic display device during verification

thresholds.description: Detect black and white copy usage during liveness verification
thresholds.criterion: Applicant may have used a black and white copy instead of a live capture
